prompt: Find ways Manny can make money today with digital marketing, UGC, AI content, or local outreach.

agents.Hunter: Best immediate money path: sell simple digital marketing help, not full software.
agents.Scout: Focus on local service businesses already spending money or needing leads.
agents.Amanda: Use direct, friendly outreach. Offer a small starter package today.
agents.David: Track every prospect in a simple CSV: name, business, contact, offer, status, next follow-up.
agents.Atlas: Recommended move: start with AI short-form video service because it matches your existing vision and can become recurring revenue.

top_recommendation.name: AI short-form video service
top_recommendation.target: Realtors, HVAC, roofers, churches, local service businesses
top_recommendation.offer: 3 AI reels for $99 or 12 reels/month for $299
top_recommendation.why_now: Businesses need content but hate making it.
top_recommendation.today_action: Message 10 local business owners with a sample offer.

backup_options.name: UGC-style local business promos
backup_options.why_now: Small businesses want authentic content more than polished ads.
backup_options.today_action: Post one Facebook offer and DM 10 businesses.

backup_options.name: AI lead list + outreach starter pack
backup_options.target: Pressure washers, cleaners, mobile detailers, lawn care, roofers
backup_options.today_action: Build one sample list and offer it in local groups.

manny_action_plan_today: Pick one offer only: 3 AI reels for $99.
Create one sample reel concept for a realtor or local service business.
Track replies in CRM Importer or a simple CSV.
Do not build more features until 10 offers are sent.
